structures.name: Program Header
structures.description: Program documentation describing indexed random update processing, portability notes, and maintenance history.

structures.name: IDENTIFICATION DIVISION
structures.description: Declares the program name VSCBEX04 and identifies the compilation unit.

structures.name: FILE-CONTROL
structures.description: Defines the indexed customer file, physical assignment, record key, RANDOM access mode, I-O open mode, and file status handling.

structures.name: CUSTFile FD
structures.description: Defines the indexed customer record layout using the shared CUSTOMER copybook.

structures.name: WORKING-STORAGE SECTION
structures.description: Declares file status fields, read and rewrite counters, key and price tables, and end-of-job display messages.

structures.name: Key and Price Table Setup
structures.description: Initializes the in-memory key and price table by moving static key/price data into the OCCURS-based table.

structures.name: 0000-Mainline
structures.description: Top-level execution flow coordinating initialization, random read/update processing, and termination.

structures.name: 1000-Begin-Job
structures.description: Populates the key/price table and opens the indexed file in I-O mode for random read and rewrite access.

structures.name: 2000-Process
structures.condition: VARYING WS-Key-SUB FROM 1 UNTIL WS-Key-SUB > WS-Key-Element-Cnt
structures.description: Iterates over the key table, performs a random read for each key, and updates the corresponding record.

structures.name: 2100-Update-CUSTFile
structures.description: Updates the customer price field using the in-memory price table and initiates the rewrite operation.

structures.name: 5000-Read-CUSTFile
structures.description: Performs a random READ using the record key, updates the read counter, and handles EOF and read error conditions.

structures.name: 6000-Re-Write-CUSTFile
structures.description: Rewrites the updated customer record to the indexed file and updates rewrite counters.

structures.name: 3000-End-Job
structures.description: Displays end-of-job statistics and closes the indexed file.

structures.name: Read/Re-Write Error Path
structures.description: Handles abnormal read or rewrite conditions by displaying diagnostics, performing cleanup, setting the return code, and terminating execution.
